  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

AC4 ph 2

OBD Information

Protocol: ISO8
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 2C
Func Name: Airbag

Requests

  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "4800",
    "name": "Commande activation liaison choc",
    "deny_sds": []

    "minbytes": 2,
    "sentbytes": "4637",
    "name": "Configuration du boitier",
    "deny_sds": [],

  {
    "minbytes": 24,
    "sentbytes": "3152",
    "name": "Salve n°3 - Détails des pannes électronique intern",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Selection mode diag 3": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Accéléromètre hors gamme ou défaillant": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Arming sensor hors gamme ou défaillant": {
